## Aliyun ROS EBS Construct Library

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.datasource.DiskReplicaGroups.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.datasource.DiskReplicaGroups.attr_disk_replica_groups
documentation: Attribute DiskReplicaGroups: The list of disk replica groups.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.datasource.DiskReplicaGroups.attr_replica_group_ids
documentation: Attribute ReplicaGroupIds: The list of replica group IDs.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::EBS::DiskReplicaGroups`, which is used to query the information about replication pair-consistent groups.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDiskReplicaGroups\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-ebs-diskreplicagroups>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.datasource.DiskReplicaGroupsProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `DiskReplicaGroups`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-ebs-diskreplicagroups>

```
param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of resource group.

param site

Property site: Site information sources for replication pairs and consistent replication groups. Possible values: - production: production site. - backup: disaster recovery site.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.datasource.DiskReplicaGroupsProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.datasource.DiskReplicaGroupsProps.resource_group_id
documentation: Property resourceGroupId: The ID of resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.datasource.DiskReplicaGroupsProps.site
documentation:
Property site: Site information sources for replication pairs and consistent replication groups.

Possible values:

- production: production site.
- backup: disaster recovery site.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.datasource.DiskReplicaPairs.attr_replica_pair_ids
documentation: Attribute ReplicaPairIds: The list of replica pair IDs.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::EBS::DiskReplicaPairs`, which is used to query the information about replication pairs.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDiskReplicaPairs\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-ebs-diskreplicapairs>

```
param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.
```

documentation:
:Property:

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.datasource.RosDiskReplicaGroups.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: The ID of resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.datasource.RosDiskReplicaGroups.site
documentation:
:Property:

site: Site information sources for replication pairs and consistent replication groups. Possible values:

- production: production site.
- backup: disaster recovery site.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::EBS::DiskReplicaGroups`, which is used to query the information about replication pair-consistent groups.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `DiskReplicaGroups` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-ebs-diskreplicagroups>

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::EBS::DiskReplicaGroup`, which is used to create a replication pair-consistent group.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDiskReplicaGroup\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ebs-diskreplicagroup>

```

```
```
Note
```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDiskReplicaPairAddition\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ebs-diskreplicapairaddition>

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.DiskReplicaPairProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `DiskReplicaPair`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ebs-diskreplicapair>

```
param destination_disk_id

Property destinationDiskId: The ID of the standby disk.

param destination_region_id

Property destinationRegionId: The ID of the region to which the disaster recovery site belongs.

param destination_zone_id

Property destinationZoneId: The ID of the zone to which the disaster recovery site belongs.

param disk_id

Property diskId: The ID of the primary disk.

param source_zone_id

Property sourceZoneId: The ID of the zone to which the production site belongs.

param bandwidth

Property bandwidth: The bandwidth for asynchronous data replication between cloud disks. The unit is Kbps. Value range: - 10240 Kbps: equal to 10 Mbps. - 20480 Kbps: equal to 20 Mbps. - 51200 Kbps: equal to 50 Mbps. - 102400 Kbps: equal to 100 Mbps. Default value: 10240. This parameter cannot be specified when the ChargeType value is PayAsYouGo The system value is 0, which indicates that the disk is dynamically allocated according to data write changes during asynchronous replication.

param description

Property description: The description of the asynchronous replication relationship. 2 to 256 English or Chinese characters in length and cannot start with' http:// 'or' https.

param disk_replica_pair_name

Property diskReplicaPairName: The name of the asynchronous replication relationship. The length must be 2 to 128 characters in length and must start with a letter or Chinese name. It cannot start with http:// or https. It can contain Chinese, English, numbers, half-width colons (:), underscores (_), half-width periods (.), or dashes (-).

param payment_type

Property paymentType: The payment type of the resource.

param period

Property period: The purchase duration of the asynchronous replication relationship. This parameter is required when 'ChargeType = PrePay. The duration unit is specified by'periodunit', and the value range is: - When 'PeriodUnit = Month', the value range of this parameter is 1, 2, 3, 6, 12, 24, 36, 60.

param period_unit

Property periodUnit: The unit of the purchase time of the asynchronous replication relationship. Value range: - Month.Default value: Month.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.

param rpo

Property rpo: The RPO value set by the consistency group in seconds. Currently only 900 seconds are supported.

param tags

Property tags: Tags of disk replica pair.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.DiskReplicaPairProps.bandwidth
documentation:
Property bandwidth: The bandwidth for asynchronous data replication between cloud disks.

The unit is Kbps. Value range:

- 10240 Kbps: equal to 10 Mbps.
- 20480 Kbps: equal to 20 Mbps.
- 51200 Kbps: equal to 50 Mbps.
- 102400 Kbps: equal to 100 Mbps.
  Default value: 10240.
  This parameter cannot be specified when the ChargeType value is PayAsYouGo The system value is 0, which indicates that the disk is dynamically allocated according to data write changes during asynchronous replication.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.DiskReplicaPairProps.description
documentation:
Property description: The description of the asynchronous replication relationship.

2 to 256 English or Chinese characters in length and cannot start with' http:// 'or' https.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.DiskReplicaPairProps.disk_replica_pair_name
documentation:
Property diskReplicaPairName: The name of the asynchronous replication relationship.

The length must be 2 to 128 characters in length and must start with a letter or Chinese name. It cannot start with http:// or https. It can contain Chinese, English, numbers, half-width colons (:), underscores (_), half-width periods (.), or dashes (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.DiskReplicaPairProps.payment_type
documentation: Property paymentType: The payment type of the resource.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.DiskReplicaPairProps.period
documentation:
Property period: The purchase duration of the asynchronous replication relationship.

This parameter is required when 'ChargeType = PrePay. The duration unit is specified by'periodunit', and the value range is:

- When 'PeriodUnit = Month', the value range of this parameter is 1, 2, 3, 6, 12, 24, 36, 60.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.DiskReplicaPairProps.period_unit
documentation:
Property periodUnit: The unit of the purchase time of the asynchronous replication relationship.

Value range:

- Month.Default value: Month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.DiskReplicaPairProps.resource_group_id
documentation: Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.DiskReplicaPairProps.rpo
documentation:
Property rpo: The RPO value set by the consistency group in seconds.

Currently only 900 seconds are supported.

documentation: Property tags: Tags of disk replica pair.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPair.bandwidth
documentation:
:Property:

bandwidth: The bandwidth for asynchronous data replication between cloud disks. The unit is Kbps. Value range:

- 10240 Kbps: equal to 10 Mbps.
- 20480 Kbps: equal to 20 Mbps.
- 51200 Kbps: equal to 50 Mbps.
- 102400 Kbps: equal to 100 Mbps.
Default value: 10240.
This parameter cannot be specified when the ChargeType value is PayAsYouGo The system value is 0, which indicates that the disk is dynamically allocated according to data write changes during asynchronous replication.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPair.description
documentation: :Property: description: The description of the asynchronous replication relationship. 2 to 256 English or Chinese characters in length and cannot start with' http:// 'or' https.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPair.disk_replica_pair_name
documentation: :Property: diskReplicaPairName: The name of the asynchronous replication relationship. The length must be 2 to 128 characters in length and must start with a letter or Chinese name. It cannot start with http:// or https. It can contain Chinese, English, numbers, half-width colons (:), underscores (_), half-width periods (.), or dashes (-).

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPair.payment_type
documentation: :Property: paymentType: The payment type of the resource

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPair.period
documentation:
:Property:

period: The purchase duration of the asynchronous replication relationship. This parameter is required when 'ChargeType = PrePay. The duration unit is specified by'periodunit', and the value range is:

- When 'PeriodUnit = Month', the value range of this parameter is 1, 2, 3, 6, 12, 24, 36, 60.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPair.period_unit
documentation:
:Property:

periodUnit: The unit of the purchase time of the asynchronous replication relationship. Value range:

- Month.Default value: Month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPair.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPair.rpo
documentation: :Property: rpo: The RPO value set by the consistency group in seconds. Currently only 900 seconds are supported.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPair.tags
documentation: :Property: tags: Tags of disk replica pair.

documentation: :Property: key: undefined

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPair.TagsProperty.value
documentation: :Property: value: undefined

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::EBS::DiskReplicaPair`, which is used to create a replication pair.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `DiskReplicaPair` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ebs-diskreplicapair>

documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPairAddition.attr_replica_group_id
documentation: :Attribute: ReplicaGroupId: The ID of the replication pair-consistent group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPairAddition.attr_replica_pair_id
documentation: :Attribute: ReplicaPairId: The ID of the replication pair.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPairAddition.replica_group_id
documentation: :Property: replicaGroupId: The ID of the replication pair-consistent group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPairAddition.replica_pair_id
documentation: :Property: replicaPairId: The ID of the replication pair. You can call the DescribeDiskReplicaPairs operation to query the IDs of existing replication pairs.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::EBS::DiskReplicaPairAddition`, which is used to add a replication pair to a replication pair-consistent group.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `DiskReplicaPairAddition` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ebs-diskreplicapairaddition>

documentation: :Property: replicaGroupId: The ID of the replication pair-consistent group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ebs.RosDiskReplicaPairAdditionProps.replica_pair_id
documentation: :Property: replicaPairId: The ID of the replication pair. You can call the DescribeDiskReplicaPairs operation to query the IDs of existing replication pairs.
